div.h2: Skip marked nodes → Opportunistic physical removal

div.p: CAS failed → Another thread won Possible causes:
Update hazard protection: c hp_release(0); // Release old prev prev = curr; // Advance hp_protect(0, prev); // Protect new prev curr = next; // Advance hp_protect(1, curr); // Protect new curr

ol.li: Marked nodes are never dereferenced for key comparison
Helping: Any thread can complete physical removal
Safety: Both prev and curr protected during CAS
Progress: Removal is lock-free (some thread succeeds)
